scripts.dev:setup: npm run setup:husky && npm run extractsql && docker compose up land-grants-backend-postgres -d && npm run docker:migrate:up && npm run dev:ingest
scripts.docker:migrate:ext:up: npm run extractsql && docker compose -f compose.migrations.yml run --rm database-up && npm run dev:ingest
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose build && docker compose up -d
scripts.git:pre-commit-hook: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.postversion: git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m $npm_package_version
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:db && npm run merge:coverage
scripts.test:db: npm run extractsql && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml --profile migrations run --rm database-up && npx vitest run --config=vitest.db.config.js --coverage; code=$?; docker compose -p land-grants-test down --volumes --remove-orphans; exit $code
scripts.test:db:up: docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml --profile migrations run --rm database-up && npx vitest run --config=vitest.db.config.js --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: npm run extractsql && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml --profile migrations run --rm database-up && npx vitest run --config=vitest.e2e.config.js --coverage; code=$?; docker compose -p land-grants-test down --volumes --remove-orphans; exit $code
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:db && npm run test:e2e && npm run merge:coverage
scripts.test:import: npm run extractsql && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml --profile migrations run --rm database-up && npx vitest run --config=vitest.import.config.js --coverage; code=$?; docker compose -p land-grants-test down --volumes --remove-orphans; exit $code
scripts.test:fixtures:generate: npm run extractsql && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -p land-grants-test -f compose.yml -f compose.test.yml --profile migrations run --rm database-up && NODE_ENV=test npx tsx scripts/generate-test-fixtures.js; code=$?; docker compose -p land-grants-test down --volumes --remove-orphans; exit $code
scripts.merge:coverage: ./scripts/move-coverage && nyc merge coverage/tmp coverage/merged/coverage.json && nyc report --temp-dir coverage/merged --reporter=html --reporter=lcov --report-dir coverage/merged
scripts.setup:husky: node -e "try { (await import('husky')).default() } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND') throw e }" --input-type module
